TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: South Africa u South Africa sa i labu nu Fey-cuo, itiza i 29 00 S, 24 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 1,219,090 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 1,214,470 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 4,620 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 54,300,704. kakalukan umah sa 79.40%, kilakilangan umah sa 7.60%, zumaay henay umah sa 13%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Pretoria . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 27 bulad 4 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Cyril Ramaphosa (SilielÔľéLamabusa Ť•ŅťáĆÁąĺ¬∑śčČÁĎ™šĹõś≤ô), 1952 a mihca 11 a bulad 17 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu South Africa ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2018 a mihca 2 bulad 15 demiad. laylay ) mukasi a laylay (ayawan i 1652) ". katuud ku mabulaway tayda itida i South Africa malaaydaay a "bihkac ni Edek a kanatal ". South Africa ini i kanatal idaw henay ku masamukasiay nu mikinkiway a tademaw atu masatademaway nu ba'tu nu babalaki. . ninaniyadu' hiyan nu lanhekuo a cudad nu masakaputay mala kitakit ni pahetikan nu babalaki, pangangan han "nanuyanuyaan nu tademaw ". nina pahetikan nu babalaki a kakitidaan idaw ku Setay-ke'hun-dan , uynihan i kanatal han nu tademaw a ba'tu saka siheci nu nababalakiyan a kakitidaan. . nuduma a kakitidaan idaw ku Sewaw-te'ke'-lanse , Kunduo-lin buhang Keluo-mute-lae , Ku'-puo buhung atu Malapa' . La'mende-te' i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat a mihcaan itini i Fa-cuo makaadih tu sakacacaya a tademaw nu ba'tuan-Tawun wawa . macacatay a tademaw nu kidu namakayda i Linpuo-puo a kenis nu Maka-panse-kay nu Ce-yiwpan a kenis nu Keni-liya atu Fuoluo-lise-pade a nababalakian nu kakitidaan i , Kuaw-culu‚ÄĒNata-e a kenis nu lilis a buhung, itdai Tun-kai-pu a kenis nu Kelay-sise-he a buhung atu Sikai-pu a kenis nu Pinni-kawtian , Aylan-cecai-dan atu papadengan tupah a buhang . hatida nu kunyun lima a lasubu (500) a mihcaan malingtu, san a tademaw itini i timulan nu Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) patideng tu sapahabay tu sakaudip a kawaw, maala ku aadupan atu lalamian. unipahabayan pabeli tu san a tademaw masakaputay idaw kunipipadangan tu udip a kasilaculan atu kasi kawaw, mikilul tu san tademaw siakay nika tanektekan atu misaahebal, tanektek misaahebal, san tademaw a tumuk mapalekal ku kawaw. nina san dademaw pahabaya sipangangan han tu "Kee-kee tademaw ", itidaay silumaay a tademaw pangangan han tu "Pu'si-man tademaw ". kiya tusa a malebut lima a lasubu (2500) a mihcaan, pan-tu a tademaw malingtu namakayda i Africa Sahara (Fey-cuo Sa-ha-laťĚěśī≤śííŚďąśčČś≤ôśľ†) likelikenan nu timulan a niyadu' nu Nize-he-sancaw-cuo pasayda i Na-fa amabulaw. itidaay a san tademaw atu musakamuay tu Pantu a kamu a tademaw inai' ku nuudip tu a sulit, sisa nina Nafa tini nu likisian hidasai nu mukasiay a cudadan makaadih kita tu kawaw nuheni. itini i kunyun nu cacay a malebut (1200) a mihcaan, pasayda i Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) amisan misiwbay amalingtu. satu, kiwkay mililiday a tademaw itini kalingatuwan amaadih, nisimsiman nuheni mikikaka tu kuowan atu hunhuo. kiwkay mililiday u mamelaway nu niyaduay a tademaw, idaw ku saka lihalay nida amatinen tu caayan a katinengan a kawaw. . mihinang kunuheni, micumud tu kuheni alan nuheni ku itidaay a tademaw u Kee-san a tademaw,Kee-kee tademaw atu Sa-en a tademaw. Pan-tu a tademaw hamaw satu pasayda i timul malimad. mikilul tu Pan-tu a tademaw nu adidiay amalimad pasayda i South Africa unuheni atu niyduay a Kee-san a tademaw alaw malalamel kunuheni mueneng. nuni kaytinian i South Africa a buhung nikulitanu a katinengan. yai timulan a Pan-tu akamu a sipacumud i satabalay a KeesanÁßĎšľäś°Ď nu kamu. mukasi mikinkiway tu pantu a tamedaw nu muenengay itida makaadih tu yadahay nu Keesan a tademaw a tuud. katinenga, Kuacu-luna-tae niyadu' satabalay nu misa ti'kinngay a kakulian kya i cacay a malebut lima a bataan(1050) a mihcaan idaw a tahkal. itini Limpuo-puo sa timulan masakaputay a tademaw u Ke-sa a tademaw, kamu han mahida u satabalay nu Keesan a tademaw nu kaumu a picidekan. Ke-sa a tademaw makatukuh tu aydaay a Tun-kai-pu niyadu a tabakiya a buting sauwac. mahkamalimad satu, nina tabakiya a mukinay nu zitatyan binacadan mababu liyasak malecad atu matabalay a binacadan. micubuk tu tayniay nu Intu'-yung timul katukuh aydaay a Mozambique a Muse-lin misiwbaya a tademaw, South Africa mala tatelungan numisiwbaya, sasiwbayan a kakitidaan idaw ku kim,ngipin nu zu, atu numaka bataday nu layak nisangaan tu kaysing kupu a tuud, galasu a mali. cacay a malebat sepat a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku pitu (1487) a mahcaan, Portugal mitahaway a tademaw ci Pae-tuolu-mau. Tiya-se' mililid tu O-cuo a tademaw misatadas tayda i Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) tumulan.cacay a bataan idaw ku tusa (12) a bulad sepat (4) a demiad, mahetik i Wuoe-wisewan . uynihan inu aywan nida Portugal pacunaay tu balunga a tademaw ci Dia-ke-.kan itini i cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku lima (1485) a mihcaan makatukuh tu saibataday a Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) nutimulan.Diaw-se pacici mililis tu timulan a Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) nutipan a dadipasan. cacay a malebtu sepat a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku sepat (1488) a mihcaan cacay a btulat walu a demaad sa, tabaki ku bali sisa mililis tu dipadipasan talaayaw, tahekal tu Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤), caay paka adih cinida tuni lakuudan tu Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) maka tumul a kakitidaan. "Rio do Infante", "Cabo das Tormentas" . cinida i cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku walu (1488) a mihcaan lima a bulad makatukuh i Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) walian a dadipasan, pangangan hannida kya kakitidaan u "Rio do Infante", u aydaay a Kelu-te ) a sauwac. nika taluma' cinida, miadih nida tu bayuay a ngawa', sisa pangangan han nida tu "Cabo das Tormenta" . kuowan nida ci Ea-han ese misumad tu ngangan "Cabo da Boa Esperan√ßa", cinida ku pakakapahay tu Tunin-du' a niyaduay a tademaw tu sakaudip. Diyase kanamuhan a kawaw atu nikaydaan itini satu ici Ciwma-se nu Portugal a cudad "Luci-tani-ya a tademawan nu dadiw " sadadiwan.

*,***,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa *,*** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa **,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa *.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa **%. tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ u tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ sa u pr…ôtoria . kakiŇčinan nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad kakiŇčiŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad sa ** bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad. tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) ajza sa ¶i ¶jrir~…ĺ *amapńßosa (sir~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ*r~…ĺamabusa ********), **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) mar~…ĺaajdaaj a "bińßka ¶ ni …ôd…ôk a kanatar~…ĺ ". soutńß afri ¶a ini i kanatar~…ĺ idaw ńß…ônaj ku masamukasiaj nu mikinkiwaj a tad…ômaw atu masatad…ômawaj nu ba Ē~ °tu nu babar~…ĺaki. . ninanijadu s…ôtaj-k…ô Ē~ °ńßun-dan , ujnińßan i kanatar~…ĺ ńßan nu tad…ômaw a ba Ē~ °tu saka sińß…ô ¶i nu nababar~…ĺakijan a kakitidaan. . nuduma a kakitidaan idaw ku s…ôwaw-t…ô Ē~ °k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺans…ô , kunduo-r~…ĺin buńßaŇč k…ôr~…ĺuo-mut…ô-r~…ĺa…ô , ku Ē~ °-puo buńßuŇč atu mar~…ĺapa Ē~ ° . r~…ĺa Ē~ °m…ônd…ô-t…ô Ē~ ° i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat a mińß ¶aan itini i fa- ¶uo makaadińß tu saka ¶a ¶aja a tad…ômaw nu ba Ē~ °tuan-tawun wawa . ma ¶a ¶ataj a tad…ômaw nu kidu namakajda i r~…ĺinpuo-puo a k…ônis nu maka-pans…ô-kaj nu ¶…ô-jiwpan a k…ônis nu k…ôni-r~…ĺija atu fuor~…ĺuo-r~…ĺis…ô-pad…ô a nababar~…ĺakian nu kakitidaan i , kuaw- ¶ur~…ĺu*nata-…ô a k…ônis nu r~…ĺir~…ĺis a buńßuŇč, itdai tun-kai-pu a k…ônis nu k…ôr~…ĺaj-sis…ô-ńß…ô a buńßuŇč atu sikai-pu a k…ônis nu pinni-kawtian , ajr~…ĺan- ¶…ô ¶ai-dan atu papad…ôŇčan tupańß a buńßaŇč . ńßatida nu kunjun r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu (***) a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčtu, san a tad…ômaw itini i timur~…ĺan nu afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) patid…ôŇč tu sapańßabaj tu sakaudip a kawaw, maar~…ĺa ku aadupan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺamian. unipańßabajan pab…ôr~…ĺi tu san a tad…ômaw masakaputaj idaw kunipipadaŇčan tu udip a kasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan atu kasi kawaw, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu san tad…ômaw siakaj nika tan…ôkt…ôkan atu misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ, tan…ôkt…ôk misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ, san tad…ômaw a tumuk mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku kawaw. nina san dad…ômaw pańßabaja sipaŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "k…ô…ô-k…ô…ô tad…ômaw ", itidaaj sir~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "pu Ē~ °si-man tad…ômaw ". kija tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu (****) a mińß ¶aan, pan-tu a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺiŇčtu namakajda i afri ¶a sańßara (f…ô- ¶uo sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa*******) r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan nu timur~…ĺan a nijadu Ē~ ° nu niz…ô-ńß…ô-san ¶aw- ¶uo pasajda i na-fa amabur~…ĺaw. itidaaj a san tad…ômaw atu musakamuaj tu pantu a kamu a tad…ômaw inai Ē~ ° ku nuudip tu a sur~…ĺit, sisa nina nafa tini nu r~…ĺikisian ńßidasai nu mukasiaj a ¶udadan makaadińß kita tu kawaw nuńß…ôni. itini i kunjun nu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut (****) a mińß ¶aan, pasajda i afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) amisan misiwbaj amar~…ĺiŇčtu. satu, kiwkaj mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw itini kar~…ĺiŇčatuwan amaadińß, nisimsiman nuńß…ôni mikikaka tu kuowan atu ńßunńßuo. kiwkaj mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj u mam…ôr~…ĺawaj nu nijaduaj a tad…ômaw, idaw ku saka r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nida amatin…ôn tu ¶aajan a katin…ôŇčan a kawaw. . mińßinaŇč kunuńß…ôni, mi ¶umud tu kuńß…ôni ar~…ĺan nuńß…ôni ku itidaaj a tad…ômaw u k…ô…ô-san a tad…ômaw,k…ô…ô-k…ô…ô tad…ômaw atu sa-…ôn a tad…ômaw. pan-tu a tad…ômaw ńßamaw satu pasajda i timur~…ĺ mar~…ĺimad. mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu pan-tu a tad…ômaw nu adidiaj amar~…ĺimad pasajda i soutńß afri ¶a unuńß…ôni atu nijduaj a k…ô…ô-san a tad…ômaw ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ kunuńß…ôni mu…ôn…ôŇč. nuni kajtinian i soutńß afri ¶a a buńßuŇč nikur~…ĺitanu a katin…ôŇčan. jai timur~…ĺan a pan-tu akamu a sipa ¶umud i satabar~…ĺaj a k…ô…ôsan*** nu kamu. mukasi mikinkiwaj tu pantu a tam…ôdaw nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj itida makaadińß tu jadańßaj nu k…ô…ôsan a tad…ômaw a tuud. katin…ôŇča, kua ¶u-r~…ĺuna-ta…ô nijadu Ē~ ° satabar~…ĺaj nu misa ti Ē~ °kinŇčaj a kakur~…ĺian kja i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a bataan(****) a mińß ¶aan idaw a tańßkar~…ĺ. itini r~…ĺimpuo-puo sa timur~…ĺan masakaputaj a tad…ômaw u k…ô-sa a tad…ômaw, kamu ńßan mańßida u satabar~…ĺaj nu k…ô…ôsan a tad…ômaw nu kaumu a pi ¶id…ôkan. k…ô-sa a tad…ômaw makatukuńß tu ajdaaj a tun-kai-pu nijadu a tabakija a butiŇč sauwa ¶. mańßkamar~…ĺimad satu, nina tabakija a mukinaj nu zitatjan bina ¶adan mababu r~…ĺijasak mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu matabar~…ĺaj a bina ¶adan. mi ¶ubuk tu tajniaj nu intu Ē~ °-juŇč timur~…ĺ katukuńß ajdaaj a mozambi*u…ô a mus…ô-r~…ĺin misiwbaja a tad…ômaw, soutńß afri ¶a mar~…ĺa tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan numisiwbaja, sasiwbajan a kakitidaan idaw ku kim,Ňčipin nu zu, atu numaka batadaj nu r~…ĺajak nisaŇčaan tu kajsiŇč kupu a tuud, gar~…ĺasu a mar~…ĺi. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbat s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku pitu (****) a mańß ¶aan, portugar~…ĺ mitańßawaj a tad…ômaw ¶i pa…ô-tuor~…ĺu-mau. tija-s…ô Ē~ ° mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu o- ¶uo a tad…ômaw misatadas tajda i afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) tumur~…ĺan. ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tusa (**) a bur~…ĺad s…ôpat (*) a d…ômiad, mańß…ôtik i wuo…ô-wis…ôwan . ujnińßan inu ajwan nida portugar~…ĺ pa ¶unaaj tu bar~…ĺuŇča a tad…ômaw ¶i dia-k…ô-.kan itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß ¶aan makatukuńß tu saibatadaj a afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) nutimur~…ĺan.diaw-s…ô pa ¶i ¶i mir~…ĺir~…ĺis tu timur~…ĺan a afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) nutipan a dadipasan. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbtu s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat (****) a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a btur~…ĺat war~…ĺu a d…ômaad sa, tabaki ku bar~…ĺi sisa mir~…ĺir~…ĺis tu dipadipasan tar~…ĺaajaw, tańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **), ¶aaj paka adińß ¶inida tuni r~…ĺakuudan tu afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) maka tumur~…ĺ a kakitidaan. "*io do infant…ô", " ¶abo das torm…ôntas" . ¶inida i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad makatukuńß i afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) war~…ĺian a dadipasan, paŇčaŇčan ńßannida kja kakitidaan u "*io do infant…ô", u ajdaaj a k…ôr~…ĺu-t…ô ) a sauwa ¶. nika tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶inida, miadińß nida tu bajuaj a Ňčawa Ē~ °, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan nida tu " ¶abo das torm…ônta" . kuowan nida ¶i …ôa-ńßan …ôs…ô misumad tu ŇčaŇčan " ¶abo da boa …ôsp…ôran*a", ¶inida ku pakakapańßaj tu tunin-du Ē~ ° a nijaduaj a tad…ômaw tu sakaudip. dijas…ô kanamuńßan a kawaw atu nikajdaan itini satu i ¶i ¶iwma-s…ô nu portugar~…ĺ a ¶udad "r~…ĺu ¶i-tani-ja a tad…ômawan nu dadiw " sadadiwan.
S.FORM: South Africa u South Africa sa i labu nu Fey-cuo, itiza i 29 00 S, 24 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 1,219,090 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 1,214,470 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 4,620 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 54,300,704. kakalukan umah sa 79.40%, kilakilangan umah sa 7.60%, zumaay henay umah sa 13%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Pretoria . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 27 bulad 4 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Cyril Ramaphosa (SilielÔľéLamabusa Ť•ŅťáĆÁąĺ¬∑śčČÁĎ™šĹõś≤ô), 1952 a mihca 11 a bulad 17 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu South Africa ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2018 a mihca 2 bulad 15 demiad. laylay ) mukasi a laylay (ayawan i 1652) ". katuud ku mabulaway tayda itida i South Africa malaaydaay a "bihkac ni Edek a kanatal ". South Africa ini i kanatal idaw henay ku masamukasiay nu mikinkiway a tademaw atu masatademaway nu ba'tu nu babalaki. . ninaniyadu' hiyan nu lanhekuo a cudad nu masakaputay mala kitakit ni pahetikan nu babalaki, pangangan han "nanuyanuyaan nu tademaw ". nina pahetikan nu babalaki a kakitidaan idaw ku Setay-ke'hun-dan , uynihan i kanatal han nu tademaw a ba'tu saka siheci nu nababalakiyan a kakitidaan. . nuduma a kakitidaan idaw ku Sewaw-te'ke'-lanse , Kunduo-lin buhang Keluo-mute-lae , Ku'-puo buhung atu Malapa' . La'mende-te' i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat a mihcaan itini i Fa-cuo makaadih tu sakacacaya a tademaw nu ba'tuan-Tawun wawa . macacatay a tademaw nu kidu namakayda i Linpuo-puo a kenis nu Maka-panse-kay nu Ce-yiwpan a kenis nu Keni-liya atu Fuoluo-lise-pade a nababalakian nu kakitidaan i , Kuaw-culu‚ÄĒNata-e a kenis nu lilis a buhung, itdai Tun-kai-pu a kenis nu Kelay-sise-he a buhung atu Sikai-pu a kenis nu Pinni-kawtian , Aylan-cecai-dan atu papadengan tupah a buhang . hatida nu kunyun lima a lasubu (500) a mihcaan malingtu, san a tademaw itini i timulan nu Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) patideng tu sapahabay tu sakaudip a kawaw, maala ku aadupan atu lalamian. unipahabayan pabeli tu san a tademaw masakaputay idaw kunipipadangan tu udip a kasilaculan atu kasi kawaw, mikilul tu san tademaw siakay nika tanektekan atu misaahebal, tanektek misaahebal, san tademaw a tumuk mapalekal ku kawaw. nina san dademaw pahabaya sipangangan han tu "Kee-kee tademaw ", itidaay silumaay a tademaw pangangan han tu "Pu'si-man tademaw ". kiya tusa a malebut lima a lasubu (2500) a mihcaan, pan-tu a tademaw malingtu namakayda i Africa Sahara (Fey-cuo Sa-ha-laťĚěśī≤śííŚďąśčČś≤ôśľ†) likelikenan nu timulan a niyadu' nu Nize-he-sancaw-cuo pasayda i Na-fa amabulaw. itidaay a san tademaw atu musakamuay tu Pantu a kamu a tademaw inai' ku nuudip tu a sulit, sisa nina Nafa tini nu likisian hidasai nu mukasiay a cudadan makaadih kita tu kawaw nuheni. itini i kunyun nu cacay a malebut (1200) a mihcaan, pasayda i Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) amisan misiwbay amalingtu. satu, kiwkay mililiday a tademaw itini kalingatuwan amaadih, nisimsiman nuheni mikikaka tu kuowan atu hunhuo. kiwkay mililiday u mamelaway nu niyaduay a tademaw, idaw ku saka lihalay nida amatinen tu caayan a katinengan a kawaw. . mihinang kunuheni, micumud tu kuheni alan nuheni ku itidaay a tademaw u Kee-san a tademaw,Kee-kee tademaw atu Sa-en a tademaw. Pan-tu a tademaw hamaw satu pasayda i timul malimad. mikilul tu Pan-tu a tademaw nu adidiay amalimad pasayda i South Africa unuheni atu niyduay a Kee-san a tademaw alaw malalamel kunuheni mueneng. nuni kaytinian i South Africa a buhung nikulitanu a katinengan. yai timulan a Pan-tu akamu a sipacumud i satabalay a KeesanÁßĎšľäś°Ď nu kamu. mukasi mikinkiway tu pantu a tamedaw nu muenengay itida makaadih tu yadahay nu Keesan a tademaw a tuud. katinenga, Kuacu-luna-tae niyadu' satabalay nu misa ti'kinngay a kakulian kya i cacay a malebut lima a bataan(1050) a mihcaan idaw a tahkal. itini Limpuo-puo sa timulan masakaputay a tademaw u Ke-sa a tademaw, kamu han mahida u satabalay nu Keesan a tademaw nu kaumu a picidekan. Ke-sa a tademaw makatukuh tu aydaay a Tun-kai-pu niyadu a tabakiya a buting sauwac. mahkamalimad satu, nina tabakiya a mukinay nu zitatyan binacadan mababu liyasak malecad atu matabalay a binacadan. micubuk tu tayniay nu Intu'-yung timul katukuh aydaay a Mozambique a Muse-lin misiwbaya a tademaw, South Africa mala tatelungan numisiwbaya, sasiwbayan a kakitidaan idaw ku kim,ngipin nu zu, atu numaka bataday nu layak nisangaan tu kaysing kupu a tuud, galasu a mali. cacay a malebat sepat a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku pitu (1487) a mahcaan, Portugal mitahaway a tademaw ci Pae-tuolu-mau. Tiya-se' mililid tu O-cuo a tademaw misatadas tayda i Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) tumulan.cacay a bataan idaw ku tusa (12) a bulad sepat (4) a demiad, mahetik i Wuoe-wisewan . uynihan inu aywan nida Portugal pacunaay tu balunga a tademaw ci Dia-ke-.kan itini i cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku lima (1485) a mihcaan makatukuh tu saibataday a Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) nutimulan.Diaw-se pacici mililis tu timulan a Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) nutipan a dadipasan. cacay a malebtu sepat a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku sepat (1488) a mihcaan cacay a btulat walu a demaad sa, tabaki ku bali sisa mililis tu dipadipasan talaayaw, tahekal tu Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤), caay paka adih cinida tuni lakuudan tu Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) maka tumul a kakitidaan. "Rio do Infante", "Cabo das Tormentas" . cinida i cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku walu (1488) a mihcaan lima a bulad makatukuh i Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) walian a dadipasan, pangangan hannida kya kakitidaan u "Rio do Infante", u aydaay a Kelu-te ) a sauwac. nika taluma' cinida, miadih nida tu bayuay a ngawa', sisa pangangan han nida tu "Cabo das Tormenta" . kuowan nida ci Ea-han ese misumad tu ngangan "Cabo da Boa Esperan√ßa", cinida ku pakakapahay tu Tunin-du' a niyaduay a tademaw tu sakaudip. Diyase kanamuhan a kawaw atu nikaydaan itini satu ici Ciwma-se nu Portugal a cudad "Luci-tani-ya a tademawan nu dadiw " sadadiwan.
S.PHON: soutńß afri ¶a u soutńß afri ¶a sa i r~…ĺabu nu f…ô- ¶uo, itiza i ** ** s, ** ** …ô. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mapur~…ĺuŇč sa *,***,*** km*. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj sa *,***,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa *,*** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa **,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa *.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa **%. tapaŇč tusu nu kunduo-r~…ĺin buńßaŇč k…ôr~…ĺuo-mut…ô-r~…ĺa…ô , ku Ē~ °-puo buńßuŇč atu mar~…ĺapa Ē~ ° . r~…ĺa Ē~ °m…ônd…ô-t…ô Ē~ ° i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat a mińß ¶aan itini i fa- ¶uo makaadińß tu saka ¶a ¶aja a tad…ômaw nu ba Ē~ °tuan-tawun wawa . ma ¶a ¶ataj a tad…ômaw nu kidu namakajda i r~…ĺinpuo-puo a k…ônis nu maka-pans…ô-kaj nu ¶…ô-jiwpan a k…ônis nu afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) patid…ôŇč tu sapańßabaj tu sakaudip a kawaw, maar~…ĺa ku aadupan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺamian. unipańßabajan pab…ôr~…ĺi tu san a tad…ômaw masakaputaj idaw kunipipadaŇčan tu udip a kasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan atu kasi kawaw, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu san tad…ômaw siakaj nika tan…ôkt…ôkan atu misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ, tan…ôkt…ôk misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ, san tad…ômaw a tumuk mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku kawaw. nina san dad…ômaw pańßabaja sipaŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "k…ô…ô-k…ô…ô tad…ômaw ", itidaaj sir~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "pu Ē~ °si-man tad…ômaw ". kija tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu (****) a mińß ¶aan, pan-tu a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺiŇčtu namakajda i afri ¶a sańßara (f…ô- ¶uo sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa*******) r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan nu timur~…ĺan a nijadu Ē~ ° nu niz…ô-ńß…ô-san ¶aw- ¶uo pasajda i na-fa amabur~…ĺaw. itidaaj a san tad…ômaw atu musakamuaj tu pantu a kamu a tad…ômaw inai Ē~ ° ku nuudip tu a sur~…ĺit, sisa nina nafa tini nu r~…ĺikisian ńßidasai nu mukasiaj a ¶udadan makaadińß kita tu kawaw nuńß…ôni. itini i kunjun nu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut (****) a mińß ¶aan, pasajda i afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) amisan misiwbaj amar~…ĺiŇčtu. satu, kiwkaj mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw itini kar~…ĺiŇčatuwan amaadińß, nisimsiman nuńß…ôni mikikaka tu kuowan atu ńßunńßuo. kiwkaj mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj u mam…ôr~…ĺawaj nu nijaduaj a tad…ômaw, idaw ku saka r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nida amatin…ôn tu ¶aajan a katin…ôŇčan a kawaw. . mińßinaŇč kunuńß…ôni, mi ¶umud tu kuńß…ôni ar~…ĺan nuńß…ôni ku itidaaj a tad…ômaw u k…ô…ô-san a tad…ômaw,k…ô…ô-k…ô…ô tad…ômaw atu sa-…ôn a tad…ômaw. pan-tu a tad…ômaw ńßamaw satu pasajda i timur~…ĺ mar~…ĺimad. mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu pan-tu a tad…ômaw nu adidiaj amar~…ĺimad pasajda i soutńß afri ¶a unuńß…ôni atu nijduaj a k…ô…ô-san a tad…ômaw ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ kunuńß…ôni mu…ôn…ôŇč. nuni kajtinian i soutńß afri ¶a a buńßuŇč nikur~…ĺitanu a katin…ôŇčan. jai timur~…ĺan a pan-tu akamu a sipa ¶umud i satabar~…ĺaj a k…ô…ôsan*** nu kamu. mukasi mikinkiwaj tu pantu a tam…ôdaw nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj itida makaadińß tu jadańßaj nu k…ô…ôsan a tad…ômaw a tuud. katin…ôŇča, kua ¶u-r~…ĺuna-ta…ô nijadu Ē~ ° satabar~…ĺaj nu misa ti Ē~ °kinŇčaj a kakur~…ĺian kja i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a bataan(****) a mińß ¶aan idaw a tańßkar~…ĺ. itini r~…ĺimpuo-puo sa timur~…ĺan masakaputaj a tad…ômaw u k…ô-sa a tad…ômaw, kamu ńßan mańßida u satabar~…ĺaj nu k…ô…ôsan a tad…ômaw nu kaumu a pi ¶id…ôkan. k…ô-sa a tad…ômaw makatukuńß tu ajdaaj a tun-kai-pu nijadu a tabakija a butiŇč sauwa ¶. mańßkamar~…ĺimad satu, nina tabakija a mukinaj nu zitatjan bina ¶adan mababu r~…ĺijasak mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu matabar~…ĺaj a bina ¶adan. mi ¶ubuk tu tajniaj nu intu Ē~ °-juŇč timur~…ĺ katukuńß ajdaaj a mozambi*u…ô a mus…ô-r~…ĺin misiwbaja a tad…ômaw, soutńß afri ¶a mar~…ĺa tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan numisiwbaja, sasiwbajan a kakitidaan idaw ku kim,Ňčipin nu zu, atu numaka batadaj nu r~…ĺajak nisaŇčaan tu kajsiŇč kupu a tuud, gar~…ĺasu a mar~…ĺi. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbat s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku pitu (****) a mańß ¶aan, portugar~…ĺ mitańßawaj a tad…ômaw ¶i pa…ô-tuor~…ĺu-mau. tija-s…ô Ē~ ° mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu o- ¶uo a tad…ômaw misatadas tajda i afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) tumur~…ĺan. ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tusa (**) a bur~…ĺad s…ôpat (*) a d…ômiad, mańß…ôtik i wuo…ô-wis…ôwan . ujnińßan inu ajwan nida portugar~…ĺ pa ¶unaaj tu bar~…ĺuŇča a tad…ômaw ¶i dia-k…ô-.kan itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß ¶aan makatukuńß tu saibatadaj a afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) nutimur~…ĺan.diaw-s…ô pa ¶i ¶i mir~…ĺir~…ĺis tu timur~…ĺan a afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) nutipan a dadipasan. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbtu s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat (****) a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a btur~…ĺat war~…ĺu a d…ômaad sa, tabaki ku bar~…ĺi sisa mir~…ĺir~…ĺis tu dipadipasan tar~…ĺaajaw, tańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **), ¶aaj paka adińß ¶inida tuni r~…ĺakuudan tu afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) maka tumur~…ĺ a kakitidaan. "*io do infant…ô", " ¶abo das torm…ôntas" . ¶inida i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad makatukuńß i afri ¶a (f…ô- ¶uo **) war~…ĺian a dadipasan, paŇčaŇčan ńßannida kja kakitidaan u "*io do infant…ô", u ajdaaj a k…ôr~…ĺu-t…ô ) a sauwa ¶. nika tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶inida, miadińß nida tu bajuaj a Ňčawa Ē~ °, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan nida tu " ¶abo das torm…ônta" . kuowan nida ¶i …ôa-ńßan …ôs…ô misumad tu ŇčaŇčan " ¶abo da boa …ôsp…ôran*a", ¶inida ku pakakapańßaj tu tunin-du Ē~ ° a nijaduaj a tad…ômaw tu sakaudip. dijas…ô kanamuńßan a kawaw atu nikajdaan itini satu i ¶i ¶iwma-s…ô nu portugar~…ĺ a ¶udad "r~…ĺu ¶i-tani-ja a tad…ômawan nu dadiw " sadadiwan.
